repos.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
repos.desc: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

repos.name: PostHog/posthog
repos.desc: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

repos.name: HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium
repos.desc: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer

repos.name: Nutlope/hallmark
repos.desc: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

repos.name: github/copilot-sdk
repos.desc: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

repos.name: protocolbuffers/protobuf
repos.desc: Protocol Buffers - Google's data interchange format

repos.name: tirth8205/code-review-graph
repos.desc: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

repos.name: docusealco/docuseal
repos.desc: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents ✍️

repos.name: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
repos.desc: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3

repos.name: RyanCodrai/turbovec
repos.desc: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

blog_md:
# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：build-your-own-x 爆火，Markdown 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-07-18  |  🔍 共收录 14 个热门项目

又到了一天一度的「看看别人在卷什么」环节。准备好你的 star 键，Let's go 🚀

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 4 | **TypeScript**: 3 | **Markdown**: 1 | **CSS**: 1 | **Java**: 1

> Python 再次上榜。简单、优雅，唯一的问题是缩进错了会爆炸 🐍
